item.title: Exclusive enteral nutrition containing transforming growth factor-β improves intestinal barrier function in a colitis mouse model.
item.description: Journal of pediatric gastroenterology and nutrition - Exclusive enteral nutrition (EEN) is the first-line treatment for pediatric Crohn's disease, but its mechanisms of action remain poorly understood. Our aim was to identify the mechanisms that could...

item.title: Standard malnutrition screening tools inadequately capture comprehensive nutritional needs in outpatients with inflammatory bowel disease.
item.description: Crohn's & colitis 360 - Malnutrition is common in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) patients and associated with worse outcomes and quality of life. This study aimed to assess the feasibility of referring outpatient IBD pa...
